businessName: Sunshine State Junk Removal & Dumpster Rental
tagline: No pressure. No runaround. Just straightforward service.
ownerNote: Owned and operated by Cesar and his wife Lynzee. Cesar is a U.S. military veteran.
positioning: Highly reviewed (5.0 stars across 159+ Google reviews)
serviceAreaSummary: Serving Broward County, Florida, with select service in Miami-Dade and Palm Beach Counties.
equipmentNote: Junk removal is priced by how much space items take up in an 18-yard dump trailer. Dump trailers are driveway-safe.
specialHandling: Items requiring special disposal (explained clearly before work begins)
legacyDesigner: Blue Crocus Solutions (previous site) — do NOT carry over credit unless client asks.

tracking.CRITICAL: Keep BOTH of these. The google-site-verification meta tag preserves Google Search Console ownership. The GTM container preserves analytics continuity. Losing either damages SEO/measurement history.
